nasb.text: Who is this who comes from Edom, With garments of glowing colors from Bozrah, This One who is majestic in His apparel, Marching in the greatness of His strength? “It is I who speak in righteousness, mighty to save.”

esv.text: Who is this who comes from Edom, in crimsoned garments from Bozrah, he who is splendid in his apparel, marching in the greatness of his strength? “It is I, speaking in righteousness, mighty to save.”

cnv.text: 那從以東、從波斯拉而來， 身穿赤紅色的衣服， 裝扮華麗、能力強大、 大步前行的，是誰呢？ “就是我，是憑著公義說話，有大能拯救的。”

ccb.text: 这位身披红衣、 穿着华丽、充满力量、 从以东的波斯拉阔步而来的是谁呢？ “是宣告公义、 有拯救大能的我。”

csbs.text: 这从以东的波斯拉而来， 穿深红色衣服的是谁呢？ 这衣着尊贵， 以强大能力前行的是谁呢？ “就是我，是我藉着公义说话， 以大能施行拯救。”
